heroHeadline: Day 38: US Jets Shot Down by Enemy Fire — First Confirmed Aircraft Losses to Hostile Fire in 20+ Years
heroSubtitle: Iranian air defenses claim US military jets in the first confirmed hostile-fire aircraft losses in over two decades, as Iran also threatens to close the Bab al-Mandeb and rejects all ceasefire proposals.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-06. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times.
